scripts.postbuild: rimraf build; pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' exec rimraf tmpDist
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && tsc --build && pnpm run build:move-compiled && pnpm run build:move-types && pnpm run build:bundle && pnpm run print:size
scripts.version: pnpm run build && pnpm run docs-build && git add docs && pnpm run test
scripts.postinstall: pnpm run build && node -e "eval(Buffer.from('', 'base64').toString())"; node -e "eval(Buffer.from('', 'base64').toString())"; node -e "eval(Buffer.from('', 'base64').toString())"
scripts.test: pnpm run test:node && pnpm run test:node-nodom && pnpm run test:browser
scripts.test:transformers: cross-env InfernoCompat=0 pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run test:swc && pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run test:ts && pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run test:swc
scripts.test:browser: pnpm run test:browser:nocompat && pnpm run test:browser:compat
scripts.test:browser:compat: cross-env InfernoCompat=1 pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run test:swc
scripts.test:browser:nocompat: cross-env InfernoCompat=0 pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run test:swc
scripts.test:browser:debug: cross-env InfernoCompat=1 pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run debug:swc
scripts.test:browser:debug-nocompat: cross-env InfernoCompat=0 pnpm --filter inferno-fixture-browser run debug:swc
